title: AXStorage
description: Interface for storage operations providing a common API for different storage mechanisms like localStorage, sessionStorage, and cookies.

types.title: AXStorage
types.description: Base interface that defines the contract for storage implementations, ensuring consistent API across different storage types.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a value from storage by its key.

methods.name: set
methods.description: Stores a value in storage with the specified key.

methods.name: remove
methods.description: Removes a value from storage by its key.

methods.name: has
methods.description: Checks if a key exists in storage.

methods.name: keys
methods.description: Returns an array of all keys in storage.

methods.name: size
methods.description: Returns the number of items in storage.
